title: ASML Holding N.V. (ASML) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: An independent discounted cash flow (DCF) intrinsic value analysis of ASML Holding N.V. (ASML) compiled entirely by Gemini 3.1.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 12.0% - Robust long-term growth fueled by the widespread adoption of High-NA EUV and global sovereign fab build-outs.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 3.5% - Reflects the company's insurmountable monopoly in mission-critical technology for the modern economy.
assumptions.discountRate: 8.5% - Lower risk premium due to absolute market dominance, despite geopolitical export control risks and cyclicality.
